description: WS6-c (#610 §6) library-name alias table: maps each legacy library token (the underscore spellings that predated the unified `libraries:[{name,cores?}]` model) to its canonical `metadata/libraries/<name>.yaml` manifest name. The orchestrator loader canonicalises every `libraries:` entry's `name` through this table; check_library_registry.py asserts every curated token resolves to exactly one existing manifest.
